description: This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.
current_state_bullets: **Codebase metrics:** ~97k production LoC; ~12k test LoC across 22 suites (including AK3 regression suites, AK4 end-to-end ABI round-trip suite, and v0.29.12 AK6-G/H/I runtime-trace additions); ~2,830 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom).

**Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE.md) â€” pre-1.0 full-kernel audit (2 CRITICAL, 23 HIGH, ~76 MED, ~101 LOW). WS-AK Phases AK1â€“AK7 complete (v0.29.1â€“v0.29.13); remaining phases AK8â€“AK10 target v1.0.0.

**Active workstream:** **WS-AK Phase AK7 COMPLETE** (v0.29.13) â€” Pre-1.0 Release Hardening (v0.29.0 audit), Phase AK7: Foundational Model (Prelude / Machine / Model). 11 sub-tasks (AK7-A..AK7-K) addressing 2 HIGH, 11 MEDIUM, 15 LOW foundational findings. Highlights: AK7-A `freezeMap_indexMap_invExtK` + capacity-sufficiency witness; AK7-B `apiInvariantBundle_frozenDirectFull` extends coverage to machine/TLB/CDT/scheduler fields; AK7-C `readMemChecked`/`writeMemChecked` bounds-checked memory; AK7-D `MessageInfo.mkChecked` validating constructor; AK7-E `ValidObjId`/`ValidThreadId`/`ValidSchedContextId`/`ValidCPtr` subtype baseline; AK7-F `ObjectKind` + `KindedObjId` parallel-structure baseline with structural disjointness; AK7-G `TCB.ext` sanctioned extensionality; AK7-H `FrozenMap.wellFormed` advisory; AK7-I `Capability.isNull` seL4_CapNull predicate; AK7-J `cdtNextNodeBounded` + `noPhysicalFrameCollision` + `TlbEntry.asidGeneration`; AK7-K `PagePermissions.toNat_ofNat_roundtrip` + `CdtNodeId.sentinel`. Prior: AK6 (v0.29.9) + audit remediation (v0.29.12), AK5 (v0.29.5â€“v0.29.6), AK4 (v0.29.4â€“v0.29.8), AK3 (v0.29.3), AK2 (v0.29.2), AK1 (v0.29.1), **WS-AJ PORTFOLIO COMPLETE** (v0.28.1â€“v0.29.0), WS-AI (v0.27.7â€“v0.28.0), WS-AH (v0.27.2â€“v0.27.6), WS-AG (v0.26.0â€“v0.27.1), WS-AFâ€“WS-B. **Next:** AK8 (Capability/Lifecycle/Data Structures), AK9 (Platform), AK10 (Closure); then WS-V (AG10: Hardware Integration).
**Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) â€” complete portfolio record and roadmap.
**Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
**Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).
